## Language
e.g., German (DE), French (FR), etc.

## Type of Change
- [ ] 📝 Correction of an existing translation
- [ ] ✨ Addition of a new language
- [ ] 🏗️ Improvement of technical i18n structure

## Description
Please describe the changes or the need for a new language. 

> [!TIP]
> Check out our **[Translation Guide](https://github.com/d0dg3r/GitSyncMarks/blob/main/docs/TRANSLATING.md)** for more details on how to contribute.

## Additional Context
Add any other information or screenshots here.
